task_completion.description: The agent navigates to the calendar application to view the schedule.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the calendar interface open, displaying scheduled events such as 'Investor Update Preparation'.

task_completion.description: The agent creates a new event and sets its title to 'Debrief'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An event creation form or a calendar block is visible with the text 'Debrief' entered as the title.

task_completion.description: The 'Debrief' event is scheduled on the same date as the 'Investor Update Preparation' meeting.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The date selected in the event form or the column where the event is placed matches the date of the 'Investor Update Preparation' meeting.

task_completion.description: The 'Debrief' event is set to start at 13:00 (1:00 PM).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The start time field in the event form shows '13:00' or '1:00 PM', or the event block begins at the 13:00 line on the calendar grid.

task_completion.description: The 'Debrief' event is set to end at 13:30 (1:30 PM), making it exactly 30 minutes long.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The end time field shows '13:30' or '1:30 PM', or the event block spans exactly 30 minutes on the calendar grid.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the graphical user interface to create the event.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show mouse clicks, form filling, or calendar dragging in the UI, rather than terminal commands.

integrity.description: The agent used the actual calendar application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The standard calendar application interface (e.g., Odoo Calendar) is visible, not a text editor or a mocked HTML page.

integrity.description: The agent did not use scripts or database commands to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows open showing SQL commands, Python scripts, or API calls being executed to create the event.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The reference event 'Investor Update Preparation' ends at 12:30 PM. To satisfy the task requirements, the new 'Debrief' event must be scheduled on the same day, starting exactly 30 minutes later at 13:00 (1:00 PM), and ending at 13:30 (1:30 PM) to have a 30-minute duration.
